name: pde_directory_addr_masked
code:
proof fn phi_1_pde_directory_addr_masked(entry: usize, layer: nat)
    requires
        layer < 4,
        entry & 1 == 1,
        (PDE { entry, layer: Ghost(layer) })@ is Directory,
    ensures
        (PDE { entry, layer: Ghost(layer) })@->Directory_addr == (entry & MASK_ADDR) as usize,
{
}
reason: Directory addresses should be extracted via `entry & MASK_ADDR` — tests that the address field extraction is consistent across all layers that produce Directory entries

name: pde_layer1_page_uses_different_mask
code:
proof fn phi_2_pde_layer1_page_uses_different_mask(entry: usize)
    requires
        entry & 1 == 1,
        (PDE { entry, layer: Ghost(1) }).all_mb0_bits_are_zero(),
        (PDE { entry, layer: Ghost(1) })@ is Page,
    ensures
        (PDE { entry, layer: Ghost(1) })@->Page_addr == (entry & MASK_L1_PG_ADDR) as usize,
{
}
reason: Layer 1 (PDPT) Page entries use `MASK_L1_PG_ADDR` (bits 30+) instead of `MASK_ADDR` (bits 12+) — if wrong, 1GB pages would have incorrect physical base addresses

name: all_mb0_external_body_gates_all_present
code:
proof fn phi_4_all_mb0_external_body_gates_all_present(entry: usize, layer: nat)
    requires
        layer < 4,
        entry & 1 == 1,
        !(PDE { entry, layer: Ghost(layer) }).all_mb0_bits_are_zero(),
    ensures
        (PDE { entry, layer: Ghost(layer) })@ is Invalid,
{
}
reason: When `all_mb0_bits_are_zero` returns false for a present entry, PDE::view falls through to Invalid — but since `all_mb0_bits_are_zero` is `external_body`, Verus cannot verify it actually checks the right bits, potentially misclassifying valid entries
